overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character exploring a gothic castle interior, moving from a candlelit dormitory through a grand common room with other students and into long corridors, featuring stone arches, fireplaces, and warm firelight throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory with fireplace and canopy beds

events.description: character turns left away from fireplace and walks toward the room exit

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory, examining the fireplace and furniture before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
four-poster bed with green curtains and wooden frame
green and silver heraldic banner hanging above fireplace
large ornate rug covering the stone floor
dark wooden trunk at foot of bed

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy gothic dormitory illuminated by a crackling fireplace. The room features green canopy beds, stone archways, and patterned carpets. The character walks around examining the space before turning toward a wooden door on the left side of the room.

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits dormitory into stone stairwell
character begins descending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: opening the heavy wooden door and stepping out onto a stone stair landing, then descending the stairs

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron handle and decorative glass panels
wide stone stairs with carved railings descending to lower level
ornate wall-mounted lamp with warm candlelight

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory through a wooden door into a stone stairwell. The environment shifts from carpeted floors to marble as the character descends a grand staircase illuminated by wall sconces, leaving the fireplace warmth behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with statues and furniture

events.description: descends stairs and enters large common room with other students present
character turns toward corridor entrance on the far side of the hall

agents.ego_description: descending the final steps and walking through the common room past groups of students

notable_agents.action: group of students in black robes standing and conversing near a stone statue

entered.detail: sweeping stone staircase with ornate balustrades
tall stone figure on pedestal near the students
framed painting of a bearded man on the stone wall
multi-armed candle holder with lit candles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand common room with high ceilings and stone architecture. Other students in black robes gather near a statue on the right. The character walks past a white sofa and framed portraits, heading toward an archway leading to a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gothic corridor with arched ceilings

events.description: enters long corridor with stained glass windows high on the walls
passing under green stained glass windows casting colored light onto the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor toward the distant end

entered.detail: long hallway with repeating stone arches and ribbed vaulting
green and red stained glass panels high on the corridor walls
high vaulted stone ceiling with decorative ribs
carved wooden balustrade along the right wall
series of doorways with pointed arches along the corridor side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long, narrow corridor with a patterned carpet runner. The gothic architecture features high arched ceilings with green stained glass windows casting colored light. Wall sconces provide warm illumination as the character walks the length of the empty hallway toward distant doorways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate warmth of a gothic dormitory into the expansive, echoing halls of a wizarding castle. It begins within a cozy room featuring green canopy beds and a crackling fireplace, moving across patterned carpets before turning toward a wooden door. As the character exits, the environment shifts from soft textiles to cold marble while descending a grand, sconce-lit staircase. The scene then opens into a vast common room with high ceilings and students in black robes, passing by white sofas and framed portraits before gliding through a stone archway. Finally, the camera enters a long, narrow corridor where the warm firelight is replaced by colored light filtering through green stained glass windows along the length of the empty hallway.
